title: Minecraft Europa (MEU)
description: Vanilla Minecraft and the industrial world brought by the Create and Mekanism mods.
body:
### **This modpack is a collision of two worlds**:

Vanilla Minecraft and the industrial world brought by the **Create and Mekanism** mods.

It combines the simplicity and exploration of traditional gameplay with advanced technologies and automation systems, creating a unique experience. With this modpack, you can enjoy both the vanilla Minecraft gameplay and the ability to build complex machines and structures, transforming the way you experience the Minecraft world.

## Features
- Roleplay focused gameplay
- Contains Create mod and many addons
- Optimised
- QoL features such as Xaeros Minimap
- 50+ mods

## official modpack server

In multiplayer selection menu you can find official modpack server

discord server dedicated for it: [link](https://discord.gg/HyJrvQPNHe)

- [Pam's HarvestCraft 2 - Food Core by Pamela Collins (MatrexsVigil) and Rhodox](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-food-core)
